description: Two handlers mutating one cell (§6.1). inc() x2 then clearCount() drives @count 0->1->2->0; #display and the snapshot both read 0. (Handler is clearCount, not `reset` — `reset` is a reserved identifier per §6.8.2.)
rationale: §6.1 reactive cells: distinct handlers (inc/clearCount) writing the same cell each re-render its interpolation; the final write (clearCount to 0) wins.
